# Trudy Fine (NYCity Matchmaking)

## Key fields

- **Offer**: Executive recruiting-style matchmaking for NYC professionals plus done-for-you profile optimization and coaching packages.
- **Funnel Type**: Three service lanes—Date Coaching, Personalized Matchmaking, Online Dating Support—each with inquiry forms and consults. (Source: web_fetch→nycitymatchmaking.com)
- **Website Review**: Clean service page describing each offer, callouts for confidentiality + success metrics, and CTA to book strategy sessions.
- **Positioning**: Appeals to time-poor Manhattan execs (mid-30s to 50s) who want a discreet, modern matchmaker + coach hybrid.
- **Digital Presence Evaluation**: Boutique team (<10) with limited social but strong SEO for “NYC matchmaking”; zero paid funnels yet.
- **Qualification**: Verified B2C offer, well-defined niche, under 100k followers—ready for Meta lookalike tests.

yuri-coach.name: Yuri – Emotional Wellness Coach for Dancers
yuri-coach.content:
# Yuri – Emotional Wellness Coach for Dancers

## Profile
- Yuri (https://www.yuri-lifecoach.com) is positioned as an emotional wellness coach for dancers, combining 20+ years of ballet experience with coaching certifications.
- Offers both 1:1 and group emotional wellness coaching for professional and aspiring dancers.
- Instagram @yuri.coach4dancers (~174 followers) is micro but focused on mindset and rehearsal tips.

## Offer
- Lead product: emotional wellness coaching packages (1:1, group) tailored to dancers’ stress, performance anxiety, injuries, and career transitions.
- Add-on: Energy Leadership Index assessment + iPEC coaching credentials for deeper diagnostic work.
- Differentiator: the dancer-first lens (emphasizes mental fitness for physically demanding art), which fits the ICP of under-100k following B2C coaches.

## Funnel
1. **Traffic**: dancer communities, studio partnerships, specialized ads targeted to “dancers + mental wellness”.
2. **Lead capture**: website features a free consult form and direct contact info (tel/email) plus mention of assessments.
3. **Nurture**: long-form storytelling on the site with testimonials from dancers and history, which can be repurposed into email content.
4. **Conversion**: schedule consult via inquiry form → 1:1 package or group program.

## Assets to reuse
- Site hero copy (“Emotional Wellness Coaching for Dancers”), testimonials, and assessment examples.
- Mention of the Energy Leadership Index – this can become a lead magnet or ad hook.
- Instagram captions referencing rehearsals or performance anxiety.

## VA Daily Tasks
- Scan Instagram/website for new posts referencing rehearsal cycles or shows; use that as a hook.
- Draft outreach referencing the dancer-specific positioning and propose a Meta ads funnel targeted at ballet studios and auditioners.
- Track replies and next action (book consult, request sample funnel). Add to shared spreadsheet.
- Recommend testing a lead magnet titled “4 Emotional Checkpoints Dancers Need Before Opening Night.”

## Notes for VA
- Keep the tone empathetic, understanding the physical/mental strain of dance.
- Offer to build a nurture sequence that leads from the Energy Leadership assessment to the coaching container.
- Tag: `dancer_coach`, `mental_fitness`, `energy_leadership`, `consult_form`, `performing_arts`.

sheri-mccall-when-we-first.name: Sheri McCall (When We First)
sheri-mccall-when-we-first.content:
# Sheri McCall (When We First)

## Key fields

- **Offer**: Offline curated introductions + companion app (Luna AI) for relationship-ready singles, blending human matchmakers with analytics and partner marketplace.
- **Funnel Type**: Hybrid matchmaking platform with waitlist form, app download CTA, and “Human Button™” concierge support (offline + AI). (Source: web_fetch→whenwefirst.com)
- **Website Review**: Slick product page explaining value props (verified profiles, human guidance, analytics) and lead form to join target cities.
- **Positioning**: Appeals to tech-savvy professionals who dislike pure swipe apps but want more than legacy matchmaking; emphasizes 16 years of experience.
- **Digital Presence Evaluation**: Team of ~7 with productized messaging; currently collecting waitlist leads—prime for paid traffic + email automations.
- **Qualification**: Running active waitlist across U.S. metros, transparent about model, and small enough for SCF to make an impact quickly.

# Kristi D. Price (Biohacker Matchmaking)

## Key fields

- **Offer**: Boutique matchmaking + coaching packages tailored to health-optimized, high-achieving singles (matchmaking, date coaching, wardrobe branding, mindset support). (Source: web_fetch→biohackermatchmaking.com)
- **Funnel Type**: Website invites singles into a free confidential database + paid consult, then upsells bespoke matchmaking, date coaching, and image consulting for biohackers/high-performance clients. (Source: web_fetch→biohackermatchmaking.com)
- **Website Review**: WordPress/BluHost site with clear hero copy (“Optimize your LOVE life”), service tiles, CTA forms, and education on success metrics—professional yet niche-specific with testimonials placeholders ready for paid traffic. (Source: web_fetch→biohackermatchmaking.com)
- **Positioning**: Targets biohacker/longevity communities that value wellness, data, and mindset alignment; Kristi is active in that subculture and offers concierge-style vetting. (Source: data/apollo/person_details_dating/6513ee1fb794220001da5e80.json + site copy)
- **Digital Presence Evaluation**: One-woman shop (headcount ≈1) with small social footprint but leverages LinkedIn + podcast interviews; site uses minimal ad tech, so paid retargeting would be net-new. (Source: data/apollo/pipeline_output.json)
- **Qualification**: Verified B2C offer, micro team, and a clearly defined psychographic niche—prime for SCF funnels + Meta targeting of health optimization communities.

brittney-knight.name: Brittney Knight
brittney-knight.content:
# Brittney Knight

## Key fields

- **Offer**: Hybrid personal training + nutrition coaching packages (strength, Pilates, CrossFit, Olympic lift coaching, virtual macro tracking).
- **Funnel Type**: Website pushes a free "Macro Tracking" lead magnet, then routes visitors to location-specific consult scheduling and contact forms for in-person or virtual coaching.
- **Website Review**: Polished Divi site with location cards, testimonials, studio photos, and multiple CTAs (‘Book BK’, ‘Apply for Coaching’) that show real services and pricing context.
- **Positioning**: Targets active women who want visible results without giving up favorite foods (‘All Foods Fit approach’), emphasizing accountability and personalized programming.
- **Digital Presence Evaluation**: Instagram @b.knight4 shows ~661 followers (micro-influencer tier) with daily reels, while the site surfaces 5.0/5 rating across 61 Google reviews in the schema snippet.
- **Qualification**: B2C fitness/nutrition coach with a tangible offer, standing studio, and active marketing assets under 100k followers – ideal for paid ads + funnel optimization.

- **Digital Presence Evaluation**: Solo practice (≈1 employee) with active blog/newsletter, Twitter + Facebook pages, and analytics stack (Circle, Slack, Remote). Lean organic presence keeps him under 100k followers yet highly searchable. (Source: data/apollo/person_details_dating/66f5c11af20fb00001221f28.json)

cortney-mcdermott.name: Cortney McDermott
cortney-mcdermott.content:
# Cortney McDermott

## Profile
- Name: Cortney McDermott
- Intuitive emotional healing coach specializing in women’s empowerment and inner work (per SimpleCoachFunnel notes).
- Site https://cortneymcdermott.com is polished, with Canva brand styling, abundant imagery, and flows.
- Has small but highly engaged community focused on emotional awareness.

## Offer
- Intuitive coaching packages (1:1 and possibly small group) aimed at women rebuilding confidence post-burnout or transitions.
- Offers likely include multi-week containers or monthly VIP support; price not listed but positioned as premium.
- Emphasizes album-like emotional healing and somatic guidance.

## Funnel
1. **Traffic**: driven via intentional social posts + email prompts.
2. **Lead magnet**: email nurture sequences nurturing visitors with free guided meditations or journal prompts (needs confirmation, could be manual offerings).
3. **Email flow**: her website explicitly mentions email sequences with warm, nurturing copy; could be expanded into triggered campaigns.
4. **Close**: CTA to book a 1:1 or apply for a container via contact form.

## Assets to track
- Downloadable PDF or audio (if available) that we can repurpose for Meta ads.
- Testimonials or social proof glimpsed on site and blog.
- Weekly email topics or posts to mirror in outreach.

## VA Daily Tasks
- Scan her Instagram/LinkedIn for new stories and highlight them in outreach (mention release of new program or reflection topic).
- Build email follow-up referencing her focus on emotional safety and intuitive guidance.
- Update the spreadsheet with any replies or new assets.
- Propose one funnel idea: `"Healing Checklist" lead magnet leading to an email sequence showcasing 3 wins, ending with an application call-to-action.`

## Notes for VA
- Tone: empathetic, safe, grounded.
- Outreach should highlight collaboration, not just sell; mention we can remove funnel friction so she can focus on coaching.
- Tag under `women_coach`, `emotional-healing`, `intuitive-guidance`, `email-nurture`.

# Kami Verne (Marriage Minded Mentor)

sarah-florence.name: Sarah Florence Life Coaching
sarah-florence.content:
# Sarah Florence Life Coaching

## Profile
- Sarah Florence is a teen confidence coach with a structured 12-week curriculum called **The Best Years Yet**.
- Website (https://www.sarahflorencecoaching.com/purchase/p/the-best-years-yet-program) converts with checkout + contracts + intake forms, signaling a serious operation.
- Instagram (@sarahflorencelifecoaching) shows ~861 followers with reels aimed at anxious teens and concerned parents.
- Markets herself as a ‘kid coach’ (not generic parenting), which differentiates her in the B2C space.

## Offer
- Primary product: 12-week coaching package for teenage girls, including worksheets, parental onboarding, and structured pricing ($1,140).
- Ancillary: à la carte emotional-health lessons, likely recurring coaching sessions.
- Unique selling point: teen-centric emotional curriculum with parent accountability, complete with legal forms embedded in the funnel.

## Funnel
1. **Paid ads / organic**: parents land on program page highlighting structured bullets, pricing, and parental trust signals.
2. **Lead capture**: checkout includes contract + intake info (parent and teen data), meaning the funnel is ready for high-intent traffic.
3. **Email nurture**: potential sequence for parents referencing progress metrics and success stories.
4. **Delivery**: once purchase is made, immediate onboarding occurs via automated forms + multi-week schedule.

## Assets to highlight
- Program page with embedded contract and pricing details (use for ad creative).
- Instagram reels and highlight stories for social proof.
- Intake form/checkout flow to understand friction points.

## VA Daily Tasks
- Review Sarah’s latest reel or story for new hooks (e.g., dealing with teen anxiety, study stress) and mention in outreach.
- Suggest a paid ad set focusing on parents of anxious teenagers (call it “The Best Years Yet” retargeting sequence) and log reaction.
- Log any direct replies or quotes she shares.
- Note which funnel steps require creative refresh (test new lead magnet or short quiz for parents).

## Notes for VA
- Emphasize safety, structure, and teen empowerment in messaging.
- Ask if she wants to expand the funnel with a parental checklist or webinar + live Q&A.
- Tag: `teens`, `confidence`, `emotional-health`, `parents`, `squarespace`, `checkout`.

preston-smiles.name: Preston Smiles
preston-smiles.content:
# Preston Smiles

## Profile
- Name: Preston Smiles
- Boutique life coach, speaker, and media personality focused on transformational growth and authenticity (persona described in SimpleCoachFunnel lead notes).
- Website (https://prestonsmiles.com) is professional with clear messaging, testimonials, and press logos, signaling legitimacy.
- Social footprint: under 100k followers but has media credits that create trust.

## Offer
- Core program: life transformation coaching, combining personal identity work, speaking engagements, and empowerment experiences.
- Price: not publicly listed, but site positioning indicates premium private coaching and signature group experiences.
- Differentiators: performer + coach background, ability to host transformational retreats.

## Funnel
1. **Traffic**: organic search + media placements → homepage featuring hero CTA + testimonials.
2. **Lead magnet**: downloads and subscription (site mentions lead magnet for personal transformation?). Need to confirm the exact asset; potential absence of heavy nurture suggests we can propose a stronger lead magnet + email sequence.
3. **Nurture**: courtesy follow-up via email (existing email list not publicly exposed) and social proof.
4. **Close**: CTA to book a 1:1 or group experience via contact form.

## Assets to capture
- Website hero, testimonials, media logos.
- Email capture form (if present) or manual opt-in instructions.
- Any downloadable workbook or live event invites.

## VA Daily Tasks
- Check Preston's latest social posts (Instagram, TikTok) for new hooks to reference.
- Draft personalized emails referencing his latest talk/podcast and highlight how we can increase program enrollments with funnel upgrades.
- Log interactions and set follow-up date in the spreadsheet.
- Monitor mentions of retreats/events to time campaigns.

## Notes for VA
- Emphasize his movement-based, human-centered story.
- Offer enhancement could be a multi-step transformation blueprint + retention email series for past participants.
- Tag him under `life_coach`, `authenticity`, `retreats`.

coach-ryan-coachryanfitness.name: Coach Ryan (CoachRyanFitness)
coach-ryan-coachryanfitness.content:
# Coach Ryan (CoachRyanFitness)

## Key fields

- **Offer**: Restorative health + functional strength coaching (in-person Houston/Cypress & remote), including posture assessments, custom nutrition, and pain-to-performance programs for 40+ clients. (Source: web_fetch→coachryanfitness.com)
- **Funnel Type**: Discovery-call funnel (“Schedule your free discovery consultation”) plus downloadable “Built for Life” blueprint that nurtures traffic into high-ticket restorative coaching packages. (Source: web_fetch→coachryanfitness.com)
- **Website Review**: Story-driven site with mission/tenets, testimonials, and clear 3-step onboarding (consult → assessment → plan). Copy highlights 30+ years / 300k hours of coaching, which builds trust and LTV potential. (Source: web_fetch→coachryanfitness.com)
- **Positioning**: Solo restorative coach helping busy adults overcome pain, regain mobility, and build “all-terrain bodies” — mixes functional training with nutrition coaching for sustainable habit change. (Source: web_fetch→coachryanfitness.com)
- **Digital Presence Evaluation**: One-person shop with minimal social footprint but professional site, CMS stack (AWS, GA, GTM), and email-first nurturing. Perfect under-100k-following target for efficient ad spend. (Source: data/apollo/person_details_life/6992662164a8970001064f16.json)
- **Qualification**: Verified service business, transparent contact info, strong proof assets, and niche yet scalable offer—meets SCF ICP. (Source: data/apollo/life_coach_bulk_match_response.json)
